description: Recurring backbone of the confusion-spam teams, paired with a confusion user (Oranguru or Shadow Girafarig) in the middle slot.

sources.author: YasserPoGO

description: The two staple Pokémon of the cup — the creator says both belong on nearly every team. Quagsire beats normal, fire, ground, and grass; Cradily is the #1 ranked Pokémon.
